authors.author: Ben Bryan
Ben Bryan
Heiliger Geist, reiß die Mauern ein

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v3 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our Father, all of Heaven roars Your name Sing louder, let this place erupt with praise Can you hear it, the sound of Heaven touching Earth The sound of Heaven touching Earth [x3]

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Spirit break out Break our walls down Spirit break out Heaven come down [x2]

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: King Jesus You're the name we're lifting high Your glory shaking up the earth and skies Revival we wanna see Your kingdom here We wanna see Your kingdom here [x2]

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Spirit break out Break our walls down Spirit break out Heaven come down

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Spirit break out Break our walls down
